name: Yam & Apple Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup apples, cored, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, melt the butter.
2. Sauté the onion for 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Add the yams, apples, stock, thyme, and maple syrup.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, until the yams and apples are tender (30-40 minutes).
6. Puree the mixture in a blender or food processor.
7. Return to the pot and reheat.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve in soup bowls.
10. Garnish with whipped cream dusted with a bit of nutmeg.
